name: House Mimolot
summary: Scholarly-magic house centered on education, book tariff systems, and controlled magical production.
motive: Maintain educational authority and magical legitimacy while controlling access to dangerous knowledge.
power_relations: Collaborates with Roaz and Union actors while guarding magical autonomy
current_pressure: need to fund education without sparking rebellion
visible_membership_base: Scholars, instructors, archive clerks, licensed mages, artificers.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: The house’s authority depends on knowledge control, so every leakage becomes both an economic and ideological wound.
